name: Tuning Curve Loss
short_description: Canonical scorer for 12-angle direction-selectivity tuning curves against the t0004 target, returning a weighted scalar loss over DSI, preferred-peak, null, and HWHM residuals plus per-metric diagnostics and a Poleg-Polsky envelope pass/fail.

entry_points.name: score
entry_points.description: Score a simulated tuning-curve CSV against the target CSV and return a ScoreReport with loss, residuals, and envelope pass/fail.

entry_points.name: score_curves
entry_points.description: Score two pre-loaded TuningCurve objects; supports custom weights and weights loaded from a JSON file.

entry_points.name: ScoreReport
entry_points.description: Frozen dataclass carrying loss_scalar, residuals, normalized_residuals, per_target_pass, passes_envelope, candidate_metrics, target_metrics, weights_used, and rmse_vs_target.

entry_points.name: load_tuning_curve
entry_points.description: Load a 12-angle tuning curve from CSV in canonical, t0004-trials, or t0004-mean schema.

entry_points.name: compute_dsi
entry_points.description: Direction Selectivity Index = (peak - null) / (peak + null); returns 0.0 for a zero-sum denominator.

entry_points.name: compute_peak_hz
entry_points.description: Firing rate (Hz) at the preferred direction.

entry_points.name: compute_null_hz
entry_points.description: Firing rate (Hz) at the null direction (minimum of the curve).

entry_points.name: compute_hwhm_deg
entry_points.description: Half-width at half-maximum in degrees via linear interpolation, rotated so the peak is at the grid midpoint.

entry_points.name: compute_reliability
entry_points.description: Split-half Pearson correlation over even/odd trials; returns None when trials are absent or variance is zero.

entry_points.name: check_envelope
entry_points.description: Evaluate a curve against the four concurrent envelope gates and return per-target pass flags.

entry_points.name: validate_weights
entry_points.description: Validate a weight mapping (correct keys, non-negative, non-zero sum).

entry_points.name: load_weights_from_json
entry_points.description: Load a weights mapping from a JSON file and validate it.

entry_points.name: tuning_curve_loss.cli
entry_points.description: Command-line entry point: score a simulated CSV against the t0004 target (or a supplied target) with optional custom weights and JSON output.
